name: Yuma AI
description: AI customer support automation for e-commerce that issues refunds, edits orders and resolves support intents.

seo.title: Yuma AI — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: Yuma AI: AI customer support automation for e-commerce that issues refunds, edits orders and resolves support intents.

when_to_use: Autonomous AI handling e-commerce refund requests end-to-end
Order edit automation resolving customer queries without agents
Support intent classification routing to AI or human fallback
Subscription management automation reducing cancellation churn
Tier-1 e-commerce support automation freeing agents for edge cases

pros: Takes real actions like refunds and order edits
Built-in for Shopify and major helpdesks
Handles common DTC intents out of the box
cons: Requires clean order data to shine
Competing with native helpdesk AI features
review.verdict: A strong Shopify-native AI agent that executes actions, not just answers, with real ROI.
review.best_for: DTC and Shopify brands automating refunds, order edits, and repetitive support tickets.
review.not_for: B2B SaaS, complex technical support, or non-commerce verticals.
